{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}RippleForge — Live Demo{% endblock %} {% block content %}

The world remembers — so you don't have to.

RippleForge is a living world engine for tabletop RPGs. Log one event — every connected NPC and faction updates automatically. AI parses your notes and projects what happens next.

This demo is pre-loaded with Lost Mine of Phandelver, Sessions 1–5. It's fully interactive — changes reset every 30 minutes.

Take the guided tour → Jump to AI tools Browse the world →

01 — Ripple Chains

One event. Four consequences.

Log Iarno Albrek's capture once. Every connected entity updates automatically — no manual work.

Iarno Albrek Session 4 capture −3

Unmasked as Glasstaff and captured by the party. His cooperation extracted key intelligence.

↳
Redbrands −3

Lost their leader — broke apart within days.

↳
Sildar Hallwinter +2

Confirmed Glasstaff's identity. A weight lifted.

↳
Harbin Wester

Visibly nervous. Asked pointed questions.

↳
Halia Thornton

Expressed quiet satisfaction. Power vacuum noted.

See all ripple chains →

02 — AI Event Parsing

Messy notes → structured events

Paste raw session notes. AI extracts every meaningful interaction, matches entities, assigns polarity.

Cragmaw Castle. Found Gundren in Grol's chamber — alive but beaten. Grol had a drow messenger (Vel'rar), she tried to flee. Grol killed in combat, Pip landed killing blow...
King Grol combat −3

Killed in combat — Pip landed the killing blow with a sneak attack.

Gundren Rockseeker dialogue +3

Rescued; agreed to grant party 10% stake in Wave Echo Cave.

Harbin Wester dialogue DM only

Asked pointed questions about recovered documents — visibly relieved when told there were none.

Try the parser →

03 — Consequence Projection

What if the party does nothing?

AI reads every active tension and forecasts probable outcomes. Review, edit, commit to the world.

Nezznar (The Black Spider) high

Accelerates excavation of Wave Echo Cave after losing contact with Vel'rar — likely to activate the Forge of Spells before the party arrives.

Vel'rar's capture removed his only early-warning system.

Harbin Wester medium

Attempts to warn the Black Spider's network — his nervousness suggests an active courier relationship.

Prior dealings inferred from his reaction to Pip's lie.

Select consequences to commit → they appear on each entity's timeline as PROJECTED entries.

Generate consequences →

Ready to explore? The whole campaign is live.

World → Party → Quests → Journal → Ripple chains → AI tools →
